calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner (mother) Sarah Mugnolo Branningan was present in pro per for self and with Co-Petitioner Joseph James Sims (father), as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Zadie Sims Brannigan, and were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the of an Adult to Sarah Kathleen Sims and change name of the Minor to Zadie Kathleen Sims.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
